text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, could we form a heart with our hands?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My father said something very impactful 
on the phone. He said my heart must be 
one with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After much research, I had Falcon upload 
instructions on how to make a heart together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to her, we must first pose, and 
then we take a picture… Say cheese, Trainer.
